data.title: People page → cream background + single accent (like Story), instead of flooded {light,deep}

data.body: Proposed by Julianna (2026-06-17): make the People page read like Story — cream background with charcoal text and a single pop of color (likely section-people-deep #B65D19) — rather than the current color-flooded {light,deep} treatment. NOTE: People is currently documented in DESIGN.md §Non-house section colors as a *flooded* section (a pair, like a house); this change reclassifies it to a *cream* section, so it ALSO needs a DESIGN.md update mirroring how Story is described (FRAC-205). People is deferred from launch but in-codebase. Open question: confirm the single accent = deep (#B65D19) vs light (#C49040).
